title: Send Event Behavior
description: Allows the mob to send an event to another mob.

event_choices.title: Event Choices
event_choices.description: List of possible events to send with conditions, weights, and targeting parameters.

min_activation_range.title: Min Activation Range
min_activation_range.description: Minimum distance from target to activate this event choice.

max_activation_range.title: Max Activation Range
max_activation_range.description: Maximum distance from target to activate this event choice.

cooldown_time.title: Cooldown Time
cooldown_time.description: Time in seconds before this choice can be used again.

cast_duration.title: Cast Duration
cast_duration.description: Time in seconds for the casting animation.

particle_color.title: Particle Color
particle_color.description: Color of particles during casting, in hex format like '#RRGGBBAA'.

weight.title: Weight
weight.description: Relative weight for random selection among event choices.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: Conditions that must be met for this event choice to be valid.

start_sound_event.title: Start Sound Event
start_sound_event.description: Sound event to play when casting starts.

sequence.title: Sequence
sequence.description: List of events to send in order with timing.

base_delay.title: Base Delay
base_delay.description: Delay in seconds before this step executes.

event.title: Event
event.description: Event to send to the target entity.

sound_event.title: Sound Event
sound_event.description: Sound event to play when this step executes.

cast_duration.title: Cast Duration
cast_duration.description: Time in seconds for the entire event sending process

look_at_target.title: Look At Target
look_at_target.description: If true, the mob will face the entity it sends an event to

base_delay.title: Base Delay
base_delay.description: Amount of time in seconds before starting this step

event.title: Event
event.description: The event to send to the entity

sound_event.title: Sound Event
sound_event.description: The sound event to play when this step happens

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.
